text: 2047 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اَلْوِصَالُ اَلَّذِي نُهِيَ عَنْهُ هُوَ أَنْ يَجْعَلَ اَلرَّجُلُ عَشَاءَهُ سَحُورَهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2047 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The continuous fasting (wisal) that is prohibited is when a person makes his evening meal (iftar) the same as his pre-dawn meal (suhoor)."
